result.stderr:
TSync 1.2.0
Dirk Brockhaus Software GmbH 2020

  download    Download data from sql database into workbook.

  upload      Upload data from workbook into sql database.

  embed       Embed synchronisation definition into workbook.

  resize      Resize workbook ranges to fit to data.

  info        Get information about synchronisation or database objects.

  help        Display more information on a specific command.

  version     Display version information.

commands.payload:
TSync 1.2.0
Dirk Brockhaus Software GmbH 2020

  download    Download data from sql database into workbook.

  upload      Upload data from workbook into sql database.

  embed       Embed synchronisation definition into workbook.

  resize      Resize workbook ranges to fit to data.

  info        Get information about synchronisation or database objects.

  help        Display more information on a specific command.

  version     Display version information.

result.stderr:
TSync 1.2.0
Dirk Brockhaus Software GmbH 2020

  -c, --ConnectionStringOrName    Required. The database connection string or
                                  the name of a registered connection string
                                  from appsettings.json. You can query the
                                  registered connection string s with 'tsync
                                  info'.

  -w, --WorkbookFileName          Required. The file name of a new or existing
                                  workbook. Only the xlsx format is supported.

  -n, --TableNames                Comma separated list of table names. You can
                                  use the underscore character to prefix table
                                  names with a database scheme.

  -d, --SyncDefinitionFileName    File name of a synchronisation definiton
                                  (JSON).

  -s, --SettingsFileName          File name of additional settings (JSON).

  -o, --WorkbookOutputFileName    Optional output workbook file name. If used,
                                  the result of the operation is saved to this
                                  file. Otherwise the original workbook will be
                                  overwritten.

  -k, --KeepFormula               (Default: false) Option to configure that
                                  download will not overwrite formulas in the
                                  download area.

  --help                          Display this help screen.

  --version                       Display version information.

result.stderr:
TSync 1.2.0
Dirk Brockhaus Software GmbH 2020

  -c, --ConnectionStringOrName    Required. The database connection string or
                                  the name of a registered connection string
                                  from appsettings.json. You can query the
                                  registered connection string s with 'tsync
                                  info'.

  -w, --WorkbookFileName          Required. The file name of a new or existing
                                  workbook. Only the xlsx format is supported.

  -n, --TableNames                Comma separated list of table names. You can
                                  use the underscore character to prefix table
                                  names with a database scheme.

  -d, --SyncDefinitionFileName    File name of a synchronisation definiton
                                  (JSON).

  -s, --SettingsFileName          File name of additional settings (JSON).

  -a, --AutoResize                (Default: false) Option to configure that
                                  'resize' should always run before upload.

  -r, --RemoveMissingRows         (Default: false) Option to remove the missing
                                  rows in the workbook from the database when
                                  uploading.

  --help                          Display this help screen.

  --version                       Display version information.

staticCommands.name: download
staticCommands.description: Download data from sql database into workbook.

options.description: The database connection string or the name of a registered connection string from appsettings.json. You can query the registered connection string s with 'tsync info'.
The file name of a new or existing workbook. Only the xlsx format is supported.
Option to configure that download will not overwrite formulas in the download area.
File name of additional settings (JSON).
File name of a synchronisation definiton (JSON).
Comma separated list of table names. You can use the underscore character to prefix table names with a database scheme.
Optional output workbook file name. If used, the result of the operation is saved to this file. Otherwise the original workbook will be overwritten.
The database connection string or the name of a registered connection string from appsettings.json. You can query the registered connection string s with 'tsync info'.
The file name of a new or existing workbook. Only the xlsx format is supported.
Option to embed a full instead of a simple synchronisation definition.
File name of a synchronisation definiton (JSON).
Comma separated list of table names. You can use the underscore character to prefix table names with a database scheme.
Optional output workbook file name. If used, the result of the operation is saved to this file. Otherwise the original workbook will be overwritten.

staticCommands.name: info
staticCommands.description: Get information about synchronisation or database objects.

options.description: The database connection string or the name of a registered connection string from appsettings.json. You can query the registered connection string s with 'tsync info'.
Output in Json format.
Comma separated list of table names. You can use the underscore character to prefix table names with a database scheme.
The file name of a new or existing workbook. Only the xlsx format is supported.

staticCommands.name: resize
staticCommands.description: Resize workbook ranges to fit to data.

options.description: The file name of a new or existing workbook. Only the xlsx format is supported.
The database connection string or the name of a registered connection string from appsettings.json. You can query the registered connection string s with 'tsync info'.
File name of a synchronisation definiton (JSON).
Comma separated list of table names. You can use the underscore character to prefix table names with a database scheme.
Optional output workbook file name. If used, the result of the operation is saved to this file. Otherwise the original workbook will be overwritten.

staticCommands.name: upload
staticCommands.description: Upload data from workbook into sql database.

options.description: The database connection string or the name of a registered connection string from appsettings.json. You can query the registered connection string s with 'tsync info'.
The file name of a new or existing workbook. Only the xlsx format is supported.
Option to configure that 'resize' should always run before upload.
Option to remove the missing rows in the workbook from the database when uploading.
File name of additional settings (JSON).
File name of a synchronisation definiton (JSON).
Comma separated list of table names. You can use the underscore character to prefix table names with a database scheme.
